scenarios.description: appendChild(null) throws IllegalArgumentException when child is null
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); Node child = null;

scenarios.description: appendChild(firstChild) initializes childNodes and adds one child with sibling index 0
scenarios.expectedResult: parent.childNodeSize() == 1 and parent.iterator().next() == child and child.siblingIndex() == 0
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); Node child = new Element("span");
assert parent.childNodeSize() == 1; assert parent.child(0) == child; assert child.siblingIndex() == 0;

scenarios.description: appendChild(secondChild) reuses existing childNodes without re-initialization and sets sibling index to 1
scenarios.precondition: parent.childNodes already initialized with one element
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); Node first = new Element("p"); parent.appendChild(first); Node second = new Element("a");
assert parent.childNodeSize() == 2; assert parent.child(1) == second; assert second.siblingIndex() == 1;

scenarios.description: appendChild(childWithParent) moves child from old parent to new parent and updates sibling index
scenarios.precondition: oldParent has childUnderTest; verify stub reparenting behavior
scenarios.expectedResult: oldParent.childNodeSize() == 0 and newParent.childNodeSize() == 1 and childUnderTest.parent() == newParent and childUnderTest.siblingIndex() == 0
pseudocode: Element oldParent = new Element("ul"); Element newParent = new Element("ol"); Element childUnderTest = new Element("li"); oldParent.appendChild(childUnderTest);
assert oldParent.childNodeSize() == 0; assert newParent.childNodeSize() == 1; assert childUnderTest.parent() == newParent; assert childUnderTest.siblingIndex() == 0;
